Service

AI Automation Consulting

Automate repetitive workflows so your team can spend more time on creative decisions and client growth.

Book Consultation All Services
Overview

Designed for practical business impact

From lead capture to reporting, automation can remove friction from everyday marketing operations. This service maps your current process, identifies automation opportunities, and implements reliable systems with the right AI tools.

Benefits

  • Reduced manual work
  • Consistent follow-up
  • Better team productivity
Challenges solved

Common bottlenecks this service improves

Slow response times

Turn this obstacle into a focused workflow, campaign, or operating improvement.

Fragmented tools

Turn this obstacle into a focused workflow, campaign, or operating improvement.

Repetitive admin work

Turn this obstacle into a focused workflow, campaign, or operating improvement.

FAQs

Questions before getting started

Do I need an existing AI tool stack?

No. Sanjita can audit your current process and recommend the right tools based on your budget, team, and goals.

Can AI marketing work for small businesses?

Yes. Small businesses often benefit quickly because automation and smarter content workflows reduce manual effort.

How does a consultation start?

It starts with a discovery conversation about your goals, bottlenecks, audience, and current marketing systems.

Where creativity meets Artificial Intelligence.
